workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Can you work with me on territory planning for Blue Yonder Airlines? I met with them last week but can't remember the details.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-25 10:12 EST
Subject: URGENT: territory planning Issue at Blue Yonder Airlines

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with territory planning. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
Date: 2024-01-10 14:40 EST
Subject: Follow-up: territory planning Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with territory planning. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Blue Yonder Airlines: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct territory planning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
